name: iframes

metadata.name: iframes
metadata.summary: Fast detection of iframes in mpegts streams

documentation:
# iframes
Fast detection of iframes in mpegts streams 

## Install
* pip install iframes
```smalltalk
python3 -mpip install iframes
```

## Run 
* local file
```js
first video.ts
```

```js
iframes video.ts
```
* https
```rebol
first https://example.com/video.ts
```

```rebol
iframes https://example.com/video.ts
```
* multicast
```rebol
first udp://@227.5.5.5:1234
```
```rebol
iframes udp://@227.5.5.5:1234
```

### programmatically 

```py3
from iframes import IFramer
ifrmr = IFramer()
first_frame = ifrmr.first('a_video.ts')
```

```py3
from iframes import IFramer
ifrmr = IFramer(shush=True)  # set IFramer.shush=True to suppress printing pts 
all_iframes = ifrmr.do('https://example.com/coolvideo.ts')
```

functions.name: iframes.version
documentation:
version prints version as a string

Odd number versions are releases.
Even number versions are testing builds between releases.

Used to set version in setup.py
and as an easy way to check which
version you have installed.

methods.name: iframes.IFramer._parse_pts
documentation:
parse pts from pkt and store it
in the dict Stream._pid_pts.

methods.name: iframes.IFramer.iter_pkts
documentation: iter_pkts iterates a mpegts stream into packets

methods.name: iframes.IFramer.do
documentation: do returns a list of PTS for the iframes.

methods.name: iframes.IFramer.first
documentation: first returns the PTS of the first iframe.
